description: The Lexus LFA, produced from 2010 to 2012, is powered by a hand-built 4.8-litre V10 producing 552 bhp, developed with Yamaha and revving to 9,000 rpm. Limited to just 500 units worldwide, the LFA is one of the rarest and most celebrated Japanese supercars ever built. The Nürburgring Package variant, limited to 50 units, is among the most valuable modern collectible cars.
